description_long: This sculpture is a detailed anatomical bust of a human head and upper neck, featuring exposed musculature, bone, and internal structures. The left side of the face is depicted with skin and muscle, while the right side reveals the underlying skull, teeth, and jaw. The sculpture is mounted on a round, dark pedestal base, which is attached to a flat platform with visible wear and printed text. The coloration is realistic, with flesh tones, bone white, and reddish-brown hues, giving it a medical or educational appearance. The surface shows signs of aging and some chipping, especially around the base. The overall form is lifelike, with intricate anatomical features and textures.
description: A realistic anatomical bust of a human head and neck, showing exposed muscles and skull, mounted on a round pedestal base with a worn platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split face with one side displaying muscles and the other side the skull, with detailed teeth and eye socket visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ear, jaw muscles, and the transition from skin to exposed bone, with the pedestal base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head and neck, with anatomical muscle striations and the pedestal's attachment to the platform.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the exposed skull, jaw, and neck vertebrae, with the pedestal and platform in clear view.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is placed on a flat platform with printed text, suggesting an indoor or educational setting, possibly a classroom or exhibit.
